zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray於大約1421年出生時，他的父親James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray23歲，母親Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes32歲。他於1452年與Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾被列為sheriff of moray。他去世於1497年3月10日在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金享年77歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray于大约1421年出生时，他的父亲James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray23岁，母亲Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes32岁。他于1452年与Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他在苏格兰艾爾金爾被列为sheriff of moray。他去世于1497年3月10日在苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金享年77岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray was born about 1421, his father, James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray, was 23 and his mother, Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes, was 32. He married Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris in 1452. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 4 daughters. His occupation is listed as sheriff of moray in Elginshire, Scotland. He died on 10 March 1497, in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, at the age of 77, and was buried in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray est né environ 1421, son père, James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris en 1452. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 4 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of moray à Elginshire, Écosse. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1497, à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray um 1421 geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray 23 und seine Mutter Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes 32. Er hat 1452 Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 4 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als sheriff of moray in Elginshire, Scotland aufgeführt. Er starb am 10. März 1497 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland und wurde in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Morayが約1421年に生まれた時，父James Dunbar 4th Earl of Morayは23歳，母Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innesは32歳であった。1452年にIsabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durrisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。スコットランドエルジンシュアイアでの職業はsheriff of morayと記録されている。彼は1497年3月10日にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンで77歳で死去し，スコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray(이)가 대략 1421년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1452년 Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 스컷랜드 엘긴실르에서 sheriff of moray이었다. 그는 1497년 3월 10일 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray nasceu aproximadamente 1421, seu pai, James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris em 1452. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 4 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como sheriff of moray em Elginshire, Scotland. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1497, em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.Wigtown, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland: вигтоун, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray родился около 1421 г., его отцу по имени James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris в 1452 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 4 дочери.  Он работал по профессии sheriff of moray в местности элгиншир, Шотландия. Он умер 10 марта 1497 г. в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Dunbar of Moray, of Westfield - Sheriff of Moray nació aproximadamente 1421, su papá, James Dunbar 4th Earl of Moray, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Isabel-nic-Alexander Innes of Innes, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Isabel Sutherland of Duffus, latterly of Westfield, of Durris en 1452. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 4 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era sheriff of moray en Elginshire, Scotland. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1497, en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.
